ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow cycling through heading levels with commands
ast.target: 允许通过命令循环切换标题级别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow H6 to demote to paragraph. If disabled, H6 will remain H6 when demoted.
ast.target: 允许H6降级为段落。如果禁用，H6在降级时将保持为H6。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The minimum heading level for cycling operations
ast.target: 循环操作的最小标题级别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum heading level for cycling operations
ast.target: 循环操作的最大标题级别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display heading level indicators in the editor gutter
ast.target: 在编辑器装订线显示标题级别指示器

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Background color for the gutter badges
ast.target: 装订线徽章的背景颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text color for the gutter badges
ast.target: 装订线徽章的文本颜色

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show warnings when heading structure might be problematic
ast.target: 当标题结构可能存在问题时显示警告

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow operations to proceed even when hierarchy issues are detected
ast.target: 即使检测到层级问题也允许操作继续

ast.name: message
ast.source: Warning: The current selection contains both H1 and H2 headings. Promoting headings within this selection might affect overall document structure. Please review.
ast.target: 警告：当前选择同时包含H1和H2标题。在此选择中提升标题可能会影响整体文档结构。请仔细检查。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Demoting H5 to H6: "Wrap after H6" is disabled, and both H5 and H6 levels exist globally. This can create a dead-end. Consider enabling "Wrap after H6".
ast.target: 将H5降级为H6：\"H6后换行\"已禁用，且全局同时存在H5和H6级别。这可能导致死胡同。请考虑启用\"H6后换行\"。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Reminder: "Wrap after H6" is enabled. Repeatedly demoting H6 will eventually convert them to Paragraphs. The document contains both H5 and H6 levels.
ast.target: 提醒：\"H6后换行\"已启用。反复降级H6最终会将其转换为段落。文档中同时存在H5和H6级别。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot demote H6 to paragraph: "Wrap after H6" is disabled. enable this setting to allow conversion to paragraph.
ast.target: 无法将H6降级为段落：\"H6后换行\"已禁用。启用此设置以允许转换为段落。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot demote H6 to paragraph: "Wrap after H6" is disabled.
ast.target: 无法将H6降级为段落：\"H6后换行\"已禁用。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot promote to H1: An H1 heading already existed within the original selection.
ast.target: 无法提升至H1：原始选择中已存在H1标题。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot demote H5 to H6: an H6 already existed in the original selection, and "Wrap after H6" is disabled.
ast.target: 无法将H5降级为H6：原始选择中已存在H6，且\"H6后换行\"已禁用。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Warning: The selection now contains both H1 and H2 headings. This might affect document structure.
ast.target: 警告：选择现在同时包含H1和H2标题。这可能会影响文档结构。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Warning: Selection now contains H5 and H6 headings, and "Wrap after H6" is disabled. This may lead to H6 dead-ends.
ast.target: 警告：当前选区包含 H5 和 H6 标题，且“H6 后换行”已禁用。这可能导致 H6 成为死胡同。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure hotkeys for all commands in Obsidian's main settings under

ast.name: text
ast.target: ”部分配置所有命令的快捷键（搜索“Heading helper”）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click on gutter badges (if enabled) to change heading levels directly with your mouse.
ast.target: 点击侧边栏徽章（如果已启用）可直接用鼠标更改标题级别。
